title: Opening for Store Manager at Starbucks India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Starbucks India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Starbucks India International Enterprises in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
